description: DyCoLiDE-EV static (full batch) vs mini-batch SGD (DyCoLiDE_EV_batch) at batch_size in {100, 50, 1}, across n_nodes in {20,40,60,80,100} and ER densities {2,3,4} on SVAR data (lag_order=1), averaged over 5 seeds. Reports both W (intra-slice DAG) and A (inter-slice / temporal) metrics. Equal-variance noise (noise_type='ev'). JSON rewrites after every fit so progress is never lost if the run is interrupted. [UPDATE 2026-05-29] d=20 cells re-fit with tuned λ_A per ER (ER2→0.015, ER3→0.01, ER4→0.01) while λ_W stayed at 0.01. See lambda_A_tuning_d20.json.
